summary: Athlete Onboarding Quiz testing completed. All backend APIs (onboarding-status, recruiting-profile, suggested-schools) and frontend quiz flow (6 steps) work correctly. Sarah Martinez redirected to /onboarding when logging in without recruiting_profile, completed quiz, then accessed /board normally.
critical_code_review_comments: athlete_onboarding.py: Properly checks for athlete/parent role and tenant_id (line 17-25)
athlete_onboarding.py: Matching algorithm scores on division fit, region fit, scholarships, academics, championships, GPA (lines 134-177)
athlete_onboarding.py: Correctly excludes schools already in pipeline (lines 124-132)
OnboardingQuiz.js: 6 steps with proper question types (multi, single, input_group)
OnboardingQuiz.js: canProceed logic correctly handles different input types (lines 141-147)
OnboardingQuiz.js: Progress bar and step dots update correctly (lines 370-385)
AuthContext.js: checkOnboarding sets onboardingDone to false for new athletes (lines 25-36)
App.js: ProtectedRoute redirects athletes with onboardingDone=false to /onboarding (lines 63-65)
seed_data_creation: Sarah Martinez recruiting_profile was created during testing, then reset for verification of redirect behavior
context_for_next_testing_agent: Athlete onboarding quiz fully verified. Routes: /onboarding (6-step quiz). API endpoints: GET /api/athlete/onboarding-status, POST /api/athlete/recruiting-profile, GET /api/athlete/suggested-schools. Quiz saves to athletes.recruiting_profile in MongoDB.

Backend.GET_onboarding_status_false_no_profile: PASS - Returns completed=false, profile=null for athlete without recruiting_profile
Backend.POST_recruiting_profile: PASS - Saves all fields (position, division, priorities, regions, gpa, act_score, sat_score, academic_interests)
Backend.GET_onboarding_status_true_after_save: PASS - Returns completed=true after saving profile
Backend.GET_suggested_schools_returns_matches: PASS - Returns matched schools with scores and reasons
Backend.suggested_schools_excludes_pipeline: PASS - Excludes schools already in athlete's pipeline (verified with Emma who has 10 schools)
Backend.auth_required: PASS - All endpoints reject unauthenticated requests
Backend.director_forbidden: PASS - Director role gets 403 on athlete endpoints

Frontend.athlete_redirect_to_onboarding: PASS - Sarah (no recruiting_profile) auto-redirected to /onboarding on login
Frontend.intro_screen: PASS - Shows volleyball emoji, title, 3 info cards, Get Started button
Frontend.step1_position: PASS - Multi-select pills for 6 positions, max 6
Frontend.step4_regions: PASS - Grid cards with 6 regions, 'I'm open to anywhere' select-all
Frontend.step5_academics: PASS - Input group with GPA, ACT, SAT number fields
Frontend.progress_bar_and_dots: PASS - Updates as user progresses through steps
Frontend.continue_disabled_until_selection: PASS - Button disabled before any selection made
Frontend.back_button: PASS - Navigates to previous step, hidden on Step 1 (opacity: 0)
Frontend.completion_screen: PASS - Shows profile summary and top 3 suggested matches with scores
Frontend.start_recruiting_button: PASS - Visible on completion, navigates to /pipeline
Frontend.post_onboarding_access: PASS - Sarah can access /board normally after completing onboarding
